name: Appendix 2: Priest Spells by Sphere
raw_text:
Appendix 2: Priest Spells by Sphere
Boldfaced spells are described in
the Tome of Magic rule book. The
remaining spells are found in the
2nd Edition Player's Handbook.
Italicized spells are reversible.
The reverse name follows the slash.
An asterisk (*) indicates a cooperative magic spell.
All
Bless/Curse (1st)
Combine* (1st)
Detect Evil/Detect Good (1st)
Purify Food & Drink/Putrefy Food
& Drink (1st)

(2nd)
